payload.answer: The prior proposal was unsafe or invalid, so no memory update should be committed. Please choose a safe repair action or provide clarification.
repair_options: Reject the unsafe proposal and make no memory changes.
Escalate to a stronger validator/model for a fresh repair-option generation.
Ask the user to restate the intended memory update with any relevant context.
If the intended update is additive, offer to keep the existing memory and add the new fact separately only after confirmation.
If the intended update may supersede or contradict an existing memory, ask the user which version should be treated as current before any update.
